name: [GRIDHAND] SMS Campaign Agent - Trigger: new contact → welcome SMS series (day 1, 3, 7)

gridhand.scenario: Trigger: new contact → welcome SMS series (day 1, 3, 7)
gridhand.description: When a new customer walks into your barbershop and provides their phone number to book an appointment, GRIDHAND's automation kicks in, triggering a welcome SMS series that sends a personalized greeting on day one, a special promotion on day three, and a loyalty reward on day seven, all through the GRIDHAND platform integrated with your existing scheduling app. This workflow runs seamlessly in the background, ensuring that each new contact receives a warm and engaging introduction to your business, encouraging them to book their first appointment and become a regular customer. By automating this welcome series, you can increase customer loyalty and drive repeat business, all without lifting a finger, and focus on what matters most - providing exceptional service to your clients.
